calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Apr-12-2007 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Linda Chavez.
Co-Petitioner: Mark Tsang, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Amanda Tsang, was sworn and examined.
Appearance of Petitioner: Nancy Tsang, was waived by the Court.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct, and sufficient and that the petition should be granted.
The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of a Minor to: Kristen Zoe Tsang.
Decree signed in open court.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Mar-29-2007 Reset To Apr-12-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 218 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Brenda Field.
Petitioner: Nancy Tsang, present in pro per as Guardian ad litem for the Minor: Amanda Tsang, was sworn and examined.
Lacks the Minor's Father consent, the OSC for Change of Name of a Minor is continued to April 12, 2007 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 218 for an appearance of the Minor's Father.
